titleStmt.title: SII 38.486: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 486. (A.R. No. 486 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the main gōpura, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Jaṭāvarman Tribhuvanachakkravarttigaḷ Śrīvallabhadēva Year 22+1: 1331 A.D.

summary.p: This epigraph contains the royal order issued to the tāṉattār of Tiruttuṟai-nāyaṉār temple, conveying the exemption of taxes, sēṉāpatippēṟu, kāṇikkai, āṭṭaikkāṇikkai, maṉaippaṇam and others collected from the temple, for providing food offerings to the god during the service which was instituted after the king's title Vāḷavāśikāṭṭiṉāṉ-sandhi.
It is also recorded that the arrangement was ordered to be engraved on stone and copper. Sarukulachchōḻaṉ Gaṅgaioṉṟumallāt-dēvaṉ, Tūṉūr-uḍaiyāṉ Vaḷavadaraiyaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmar tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrī
śrī vallabhadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmā
ṇṭu mutal Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaināyaṉār koyiltāṉattāṟku taṅkaḷ
nāyaṉār koyilil nām peṟṟuppotum ce(ya)ṉāpatippeṟukāṇi
kkai Āṭṭaikkāṇikkai maṉaippaṇam Uḷḷiṭṭa mutal Iṉnā
yaṉāṟku nam perāl kaṭṭiṉa vāḷvācikaṭṭiṉāṉcantikku cāttuppa

ṭikkum paṭi vyañjanattukkum kaṟiamutukkum kaḻittuviṭṭom Ippaṭi
kku Ituve Aṟuti Olai Ākak koṇṭu candrāditya varaiyum cella
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ippaṭi carukulaccoḻaṉ kaṅkai
Oṉṟu mallāttevaṉThe wording is not clear.Eḻuttu § tūṉūr Uṭaiyāṉ vaḷavataraiyaṉ
Eḻuttu § pāṅkalūr Uṭaiyāṉ cetirāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
vāymuraṉ Uṭaiyāṉ muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
llammuṭaiyāṉ Eṉaiāḷuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.486 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
